q: When the students reached late the teacher objected their entering the class without his permission.
options: the teacher objected their entering the class

q: The captain and his wife were invited for the cultural function at my home.
correction: for the cultural → to the cultural

q: The government decided to write of the debts of the farmers who were below the poverty line.
correction: write of the debts → write off the debts

q: Children visiting the park are amused by the monkeys play in the cages.
correction: play in the cages → playing in the cages

q: The great actor was angry with the treatment during the party in Ashoka Hall.
correction: during the party → at the party

q: Don't go by his appearance, he is capable at doing any work without any hesitation.
The teacher pointed out the students that they might learn something from Kalidas because Kalidas was the Shakespeare of India.
options: Kalidas was the Shakespeare of India.

q: The consequence of the action was not fully realised to the authorities.
options: the action was not fully realised
correction: to the authorities → by the authorities

q: I am pleased to sanction one special increment to all the employees with the month.
correction: with the month → for the month

q: I have an appointment on the 9th of September on 5 o'clock.
